channel.title: Alternative on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Alternative on Arrans github.io

item.title: supabase/supabase
item.description: The open source Firebase alternative. Supabase gives you a dedicated Postgres database to build your web, mobile, and AI applications.

item.title: uowuo/abaddon
item.description: An alternative Discord client with voice support made with C++ and GTK 3
